title: Tacz Enhance
description: Modpack enhance for tacz gun mods.
body:
**Discord** 
[Discord invitation link ](https://discord.gg/pVpsnWpbvM)

**Patreon**
[Patreon donate link](https://patreon.com/Tacz_Enhance?utm_medium=unknown&utm_source=join_link&utm_campaign=creatorshare_fan&utm_content=copyLink)

**Main menu customization**
The main menu has been redesigned to match the Tacz mod style.
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45eca746e5b47099cf0ca5de5c4ae158d6813fad.jpeg)

**Missing Translation Resource Pack**
I have worked on the missing translations. Currently, only Korean is supported.

**Description**
This modpack was created to enhance your tacz mod experience. We've added a number of mods that will enhance your tacz mod experience.The explanation is based on the latest version 1.21.1.

**Version Support Plan**
This modpack only supports Minecraft 1.21.1 and 1.20.1. Starting with version 2.5, Boss Mod is also supported on Fabric. Neoforge includes Boss Mod starting from version 1.5, and Fabric versions below 2.5 do not have Boss Mod. Please refer to the mod list for more information. If the mod becomes updated, it may be updated. However, depending on personal circumstances and the update speed of the mods, some delays may occur.

**Mod List**

**function mod**

**The Twilight Forest**
A realm basked in mystery and eerie twilight, you will overpower terrifying creatures and secure the adventure of a lifetime; in the Twilight Forest.

**L_Ender's Cataclysm**
Cataclysm is a mod that adds difficult dungeons, challenging boss-fights and powerful items.

**Bosses of Mass Destruction**
WIP mod that adds boss fights to Minecraft

**Mowzie's Mobs**
Mowzie's Mobs adds a variety of fictional creatures to Minecraft, priding itself in unique AI, rich atmosphere, and fluid animations.

**MVS-MNS-MES**
adds 130+ vanilla style structures to your world to bring it alive, using vanilla blocks. Includes dungeons and enemies to fight!

**Tacz Mod*

**[TaCZ] Timeless and Classics Zero Guns**
The most Immersive and Customizable modern FPS experience in Minecraft - A complete Remaster of the TaC gun mod by the original team.

Deletion of Tacz addon due to bug

**Backport mod**

1. Vanilla Backport
2. Copper Age Backport
3. Backported Spears
The plan is to integrate once Vanilla Backport is updated.

**Visual**

**Distant Horizons**
See farther without turning your game into a slide show

**Dynamic Trees**
Trees that grow, forests that spread

**Physics Mod**
Welcome to a more destructive Minecraft than you've ever seen before!

**Fancy World Animations**
This mod adds animations to a bunch of interactable blocks like doors, trapdoors, levers, buttons, jukeboxes but also swinging lanterns and much more! It makes everything smooth

**Effectual**
Atmospheric effects and decorative particles.

**Particular**
Enhances Minecraft's ambience with hand-crafted visual effects like fireflies, falling leaves, and waterfall cascades

**Qol mod**

**Diagonal Fences**
Fences connecting diagonally? Wait. That's illegal.

**Player Locator Plus**
Track other players' locations on your experience bar like a compass! (Replaces/augments vanilla Locator Bar)

**Xaero's Minimap**
Displays a map of the nearby world terrain, players, mobs, entities in the corner of your screen.

**Xaero's World Map**
Adds a full screen world map which shows you what you have explored in the world. Works great together with Xaero's Minimap.

**BetterF3**
BetterF3 is a mod that replaces Minecraft's original debug HUD with a highly customizable, more human-readable HUD.

**AppleSkin**
Food/hunger-related HUD improvements

**Jade**
Shows information about what you are looking at. (Hwyla/Waila fork for Minecraft 1.16+)

**Mouse Tweaks**
Enhances inventory management by adding various functions to the mouse buttons.

**Just Enough Items (JEI)**
View Items and Recipes

**Simple Voice Chat**
A working voice chat in Minecraft!

**Optimization mod**
Most optimization modes are the same as the optimization mode list in Fabulously Optimized.

**Shader pack**

Enables the use of shaders.
This modpack includes 6 shader packs designed with specifications in mind.

**Shader list**
1. Bliss
2. BSL
3. ComplementaryReimagined
4. ComplementaryUnbound
5. FastPBR
6. Photon
All shaders support Distant Horizons.

**When applied to the server**
Remove all client-only modes.
